This is a wdspec test.
[FAIL] test_no_browsing_context
  AssertionError: assert 'no such element' == 'no such window'
[PASS] test_no_such_element_with_invalid_value
[FAIL] test_no_such_element_with_shadow_root
  assert 200 == 404
[PASS] test_no_such_element_from_other_window_handle[open]
[PASS] test_no_such_element_from_other_window_handle[closed]
[FAIL] test_no_such_element_from_other_frame[open]
  assert 200 == 404
[FAIL] test_no_such_element_from_other_frame[closed]
  assert 500 == 404
[FAIL] test_stale_element_reference[top_context]
  assert 200 == 404
[FAIL] test_stale_element_reference[child_context]
  assert 200 == 404
[PASS] test_computed_roles[<article>foo</article>-article-article]
[PASS] test_computed_roles[<input role=searchbox>-input-searchbox]
[PASS] test_computed_roles[<img role=button tabindex=0>-img-button]
Harness: the test ran to completion.
